title: Tissue Culture PBS Preparation
author: Jacquelina.Woods
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.byajpscn

steps.title: Dissolve components in deionized or ultrapure water to 1L
steps.instruction: Dissolve components in deionized or ultrapure water to 1L.
8.0 g Sodium Chloride (NaCl) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S3014
0.2 g Potassium Chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P9541
0.12 g Potassium Phosphate dibasic (KH2PO4) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P9791
0.91 g Sodium Phosphate dibasic anhydrous (Na2HPO4) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S5011

steps.title: Store at 2-8 °C For 2X...
steps.instruction: Store at 2-8 °C For 2X tc PBS, double components in 1.1 - 1.4

steps.title: Alternatively, 1X and 2X PBS can...
steps.instruction: Alternatively, 1X and 2X PBS can be made by dilution of 10X PBS Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P5493 into sterile deionized or ultrapure water.
